Class OidcAuthorizationResource

java.lang.Object
iu.auth.config.OidcAuthorizationResource
All Implemented Interfaces:
edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
public abstract class OidcAuthorizationResource extends Object implements edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
IuOidcAuthorization implementation resource.

    Provides the session handler to use for authorization endpoint interactions.

    Handles post-authorization activity before issuing a new session cookie and final redirect.

    Reads the OIDC provider metadata, or returns the last known good version if cached and not expired or temporarily unavailable.

  • Method Details

    • getOidcClient

      protected abstract IuOidcClient getOidcClient()
      Get OIDC client configuration.
      Returns:
      IuOidcClient

    • getSessionHandler

      protected abstract edu.iu.auth.session.IuSessionHandler getSessionHandler()
      Provides the session handler to use for authorization endpoint interactions.
      Returns:
      IuSessionHandler

    • handlePostAuth

      protected abstract void handlePostAuth(OidcPostAuthSession postAuth)
      Handles post-authorization activity before issuing a new session cookie and final redirect.
      Parameters:
      postAuth - populated OidcPostAuthSession

    • oidcProviderMetadata

      IuOpenIdProviderMetadata oidcProviderMetadata()
      Reads the OIDC provider metadata, or returns the last known good version if cached and not expired or temporarily unavailable.
      Returns:
      IuOpenIdProviderMetadata

    • init

      public edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuAuthorizationRedirect init(String delegatingPrincipal, String backdoorId)
      Specified by:
      init in interface edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization

    • codeTokenAuth

      protected void codeTokenAuth(edu.iu.auth.oauth.IuCallerAttributes caller, String code, String nonce, HttpRequest.Builder requestBuilder)
      Adds authorization attributes to a token endpoint code request.
      Parameters:
      caller - caller attributes for adding as authorization details to the client assertion
      code - authorization code received at the redirect URI
      nonce - nonce value from the original authorization request
      requestBuilder - HttpRequest.Builder

    • handleTokenResponse

      void handleTokenResponse(OidcPostAuthSession postAuth, String nonce, OAuthTokenResponse tokenResponse)
      Handles a token response.
      Parameters:
      postAuth - post-auth session detail for storing verified response tokens
      nonce - nonce value from the original authorization request
      tokenResponse - parsed response from the OP token endpoint

    • authorize

      public edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuAuthorizationRedirect authorize(edu.iu.auth.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes, String code, String state)
      Specified by:
      authorize in interface edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization

    • refreshTokenAuth

      protected void refreshTokenAuth(edu.iu.auth.oauth.IuCallerAttributes caller, String refreshToken, String nonce, HttpRequest.Builder requestBuilder)
      Adds authorization attributes to a token endpoint refresh request.
      Parameters:
      caller - caller attributes for adding as authorization details to the client assertion
      refreshToken - refresh token from the most recent token response
      nonce - nonce value from the original authorization request
      requestBuilder - HttpRequest.Builder

    • refresh

      protected String refresh(edu.iu.auth.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes, String refreshToken, edu.iu.auth.session.IuSession session)
      Refreshes the tokens for an authorization session with expired id and/or access tokens.
      Parameters:
      requestAttributes - incoming request attributes
      refreshToken - refresh token from most recent token endpoint response
      session - session with expired tokens
      Returns:
      set-cookie header value for the updated session

    • getAuthorizedPrincipal

      public edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuAuthorizedPrincipal getAuthorizedPrincipal(edu.iu.auth.IuRequestAttributes requestAttributes)
      Specified by:
      getAuthorizedPrincipal in interface edu.iu.auth.oidc.IuOidcAuthorization
